institutions.name: National Aerospace University / Jozef Stefan Institute

entries.notes: IMPORTANT CORRECTION: OpenAlex's disambiguated institution field mislabels co-author Daniela Pedrini as 'Department of Space (IN)' -- an institution-matching error. Her raw_affiliation_string in the same OpenAlex record reads verbatim 'SITAEL Space Division, Pisa, 56121, Italy', matching her affiliation in the companion paper L09-024 (SITAEL, IT). Per the binding rule against inferring from names, the raw affiliation text (not the mismapped institution ID) was used: Pedrini is Italy-affiliated, not India. No genuine Indian co-author on this multinational review. Verdict: verified_non_india_origin (all 10 co-authors resolve to SG/US/IT/FR/UA/SI/IL/AU).
